# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

job_build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - # build steps
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - binaries
      - configs

job_artifact_download:
  stage: build
  dependencies: [job_build]
  variables:
    ARTIFACT_TOKEN: $CI_REGISTRY_AUTH_TOKEN
  script:
    - apk add curl
    - mkdir -p ~/artifacts
    - curl --user $ARTIFACT_TOKEN https://gitlab-ci-token.globale.ondigitalocean.com/v1/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/job/$CI_PIPELINE_ID/$CI_JOB_ID/artifacts/download -o ~/artifacts/binaries
    - curl --user $ARTIFACT_TOKEN https://gitlab-ci-token.globale.ondigitalocean.com/v1/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/job/$CI_PIPELINE_ID/$CI_JOB_ID/artifacts/download -H "Content-Disposition: attachment; filename=configs" -o ~/artifacts/configs

job_deploy:
  stage: deploy
  dependencies: [job_artifact_download]
  script:
    - # deployment steps using binaries and configs downloaded in previous job
